payload.answer: I’m not confident which Sam or note you mean. Please choose how to handle it before I update anything.
repair_options: Clarify which Sam this refers to, then review possible matching memories.
Treat this as a new separate Sam note and do not merge it with existing memories.
Keep existing Sam-related memories unchanged and discard this new note.
Provide more context, such as Sam’s full name, relationship, project, or the exact note content.
